---
title: "Mergent Intellect"
page-layout: article
---

# Mergent Intellect

## Description

Global business directory with public and private company data, executive contacts, and industry research from D&B Hoovers. Supports company and market research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Market Research
- **Access model:** Request Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Market Research

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=https://www.mergentintellect.com)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
